entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress characterized by a deficiency of water that limits crop productivity)

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area)

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food)

entities.name: MODERATE DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A level of drought where crops grow at a reduced rate but do not completely fail)

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under drought conditions)

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process by which a plant or crop system adjusts to environmental changes to survive and produce)

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Human interventions and practices used to optimize crop growth and yield)

entities.name: EXTREME DROUGHT
entities.description: Severe water deficiency that causes complete crop failure)

entities.name: CROP FAILURE
entities.description: The total loss of a crop due to adverse environmental conditions)

entities.name: CROP GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity and variation of organisms in crops)

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Biological characteristics related to the internal functioning of the plant)

entities.name: CROP WATER USE
entities.description: The amount of water utilized by a crop during its growth cycle)

entities.name: WATER CAPTURE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to acquire water from the soil)

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water accessible to the plant for growth)

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of biomass produced to the amount of water transpired)

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events in a plant's life cycle)

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water movement through a plant and its evaporation from aerial parts)

entities.name: TILLERING
entities.description: The production of side shoots by the main stem of a grass or cereal crop)

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The developmental stage where seeds are filled with nutrients)

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area)

entities.name: CROP MODELS
entities.description: Mathematical representations used to simulate crop growth and responses to various factors)

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The external surroundings and conditions in which a crop grows)

entities.name: PLANT GENETIC INFORMATION
entities.description: Data regarding the genetic makeup and markers of a plant)

entities.name: MODELLING
entities.description: The act of using mathematical models to simulate and predict crop outcomes)

entities.name: CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Different cultivars of a crop species suited to specific environments)
